lines.line: Baby ចូលមកជិត សុំអូនកុំគិតយូរ
lines.translation: Baby comes close, ask me not to think long
lines.phonetic: baby  chaul mk chit  som aun kom kit your

lines.line: Baby ចូលមកជិត ហើយសុំអូនកុំគិតយូរ
lines.translation: Baby came closer and asked me not to think long
lines.phonetic: baby  chaul mk chit  haey som aun kom kit your

lines.line: (Baby ចូលមកជិត សុំអូនកុំគិតយូរ)
lines.translation: (Baby came close, please don't think too long)
lines.phonetic: (baby  chaul mk chit  som aun kom kit your)

lines.line: Baby me and you ពួកយើងស៊ីជម្ពូ
lines.translation: Baby me and you
lines.phonetic: baby me and you  puok yeung saichompou

lines.line: បងមិនដែលឃើញអ្នកណាកាយវិការ like that
lines.translation: I have never seen anyone gesture like that
lines.phonetic: bng min del kheunh anaknea kayvikear like that

lines.line: (បងមិនដែលឃើញអ្នកណាកាយវិការ like that)
lines.translation: (I have never seen anyone gesture like that)
lines.phonetic: ( bng min del kheunh anaknea kayvikear like that)

lines.line: សម្លឹងមើលពីចម្ងាយ បងមើលចង់បែកភ្នែក
lines.translation: Looking from a distance, I want to break my eyes
lines.phonetic: samlung meul pi chamngeay  bng meul chng bek phnek

lines.line: (សម្លឹងមើលពីចម្ងាយ បងមើលចង់បែកភ្នែក)
lines.translation: (Looking from a distance, I want to close my eyes)
lines.phonetic: ( samlung meul pi chamngeay  bng meul chng bek phnek)

lines.line: អូនប្រៀបដូចជាផ្កាដែលបងនេះចង់ក្រេប
lines.translation: I'm like the flower you want to sleep on
lines.phonetic: aun brieb dauchchea phka del bng nih chng kreb

lines.line: (អូនប្រៀបដូចជាផ្កាដែលបងនេះចង់ក្រេប)
lines.translation: (I'm like a flower that you want to sleep on)
lines.phonetic: ( aun brieb dauchchea phka del bng nih chng kreb)

lines.line: Do it every night, like this or like that
lines.translation: Do it every night, like this or like that
lines.phonetic: do it every night, like this or like that

lines.line: (ធ្វើវាជារៀងរាល់យប់ បែបនេះ ឬបែបនោះ) បកជាខ្មែរ
lines.translation: (Do it every night like this or that) Translated into Khmer
lines.phonetic: ( thveu vea chea riengreal yb bebnih  ryy beb noh)  b k cheakhmer

lines.line: Baby ចូលមកជិត ចូលមកកៀកនឹងបង love
lines.translation: Baby, come closer, come closer, I love you
lines.phonetic: baby  chaul mk chit  chaul mk kiek nung bng love

lines.line: ដឹងតែចូលចិត្ត តាំងពីជួបដំបូង love
lines.translation: I know I like it from the first time I meet love
lines.phonetic: doeng te chaulchett  tangpi chuob dambaung love

lines.line: បើសិនបានស្នេហ៍ដឹងតែពណ៌បៃតង
lines.translation: If you love only green
lines.phonetic: baesen ban sne doeng te pnrbaitng

lines.line: ចង់បានបងក្បែរ baby all night long
lines.translation: Want you near baby all night long
lines.phonetic: chngban bng kber baby all night long

lines.line: បើសិនបានហើយដឹងតែ not enough
lines.translation: If only I knew not enough
lines.phonetic: baesen ban haey doeng te not enough

lines.line: Baby can I get some love
lines.translation: Baby can I get some love
lines.phonetic: baby can i get some love

lines.line: Tell me what you want
lines.translation: Tell me what you want
lines.phonetic: tell me what you want

lines.line: Baby hit me up Oh, baby hit me up
lines.translation: Baby hit me up Oh, baby hit me up
lines.phonetic: baby hit me up oh, baby hit me up

lines.line: ចង់ឱ្យស៊ីជម្ពូ ឬក៏ចង់ឱ្យលេងចាប៉ីអូន
lines.translation: Want to eat Chumpo or want to play Chapey Oun
lines.phonetic: chngaoy saichompou  ryyka chngaoy leng chabei aun

lines.line: ពួកបងអ្នកចម្រៀងសម័យថ្មីអូន
lines.translation: You modern singers Oun
lines.phonetic: puok bng anakachamrieng samyothmei aun

lines.line: ពេលនេះជាប់ចិត្ត ជាប់កាយបេតីអូន
lines.translation: Now I'm in love with Betty Oun
lines.phonetic: pelnih cheabchett  cheab kay betei aun

lines.line: ចាំបងអ្នកលកបងអ្នកលៃ អូនកុំភ័យអូន
lines.translation: Do not be afraid of me
lines.phonetic: cham bng anak l k bng anak lei  aun kom phy aun

lines.line: ពីមុនថាមិនស្គាល់ មិនដឹងថាមកពីណាពីណីអូន
lines.translation: Previously, I do not know, I do not know where I came from
lines.phonetic: pimoun tha min skal  mindoeng tha mk pineapinei aun

lines.line: ពេលនេះដើរមកទាន់ក៏ឃើញរូប shawty singing my song
lines.translation: Now I came to see shawty singing my song
lines.phonetic: pelnih daeromk tean ka kheunh roub shawty singing my song

lines.line: ស្នេហាវ័យទំនើប នៅ club មិនហ៊ាននិយាយអូន
lines.translation: Modern love at the club does not dare to talk to you
lines.phonetic: snehea vy tomneub now club  min han niyeay aun

lines.line: ចង់ឱ្យ show me love,
lines.translation: Want to show me love,
lines.phonetic: chngaoy show me love,

lines.line: Me love បើមាននិស្ស័យអូន
lines.translation: Me love if you have a temperament
lines.phonetic: me love  bae meannissay aun

words.word: មាននិស្ស័យ

lines.translation: You make me fall asleep imagining
lines.phonetic: aun thveu aoy bng dekduol srameusramei

words.word: ស្រមើស្រមៃ

lines.phonetic: arommo dauch min sruol  chruolochrabl teang thngai

words.word: ជ្រួលច្របល់

lines.phonetic: pelnih arommo dauchchea rompheub

lines.line: Shawty, she wanna make love
lines.translation: Shawty, she wanna make love
lines.phonetic: shawty, she wanna make love

lines.translation: Love in the modern world makes you dream
lines.phonetic: snehea nowknong piphp tomneub  thveu aoy bng dek sramei

lines.line: នាងថាខ្ញុំអាចធ្វើឱ្យនាងច្រៀងនាងរាំ

lines.phonetic: neang tha khnhom ach thveu aoy neang chrieng neang roam

lines.translation: Make the sky thunder
lines.phonetic: thveu aoy mekh phlieng phkarlan
